titleStmt.title: SII 42.246: original edition by C Somasundara Rao
No. 246. (A.R. No. 8 of 1956-57.) Narsāpur, Narsapur Taluk, West Godavari District, Andhra Pradesh.

summary.p: On a pillar set up outside the Madanagōpālasvāmin temple.
Vīrabhadra of the Chāḷukyas of Niḍadavōlu.
This is dated in the year 15, uttarāyaṇa Sankrānti.

Registers the gift of a perpetual lamp to the temple of Mārkaṇḍēśvara-mahādēva at Rājamahēndrapura for which 50 inupa-yeḍḷu (buffaloes) were given by Pōtāsāni, daughter of Potamāṟēni(?). The buffaloes were entrusted to Kētana-bōya, son of Pōtana-pāṅgu for the daily supply of ghee measuring one sāniya-mānika to the temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti sarvvalōkāśraya śrī viṣṇuvarddhana mahārājulaina vīrabhadrēśvaradēva cakrava
rtti vijayarājya saṁvatsaraṁbulū 15 śrāhini Uttarāyaṇa saṁkraṁtti (saṁkrāṁti)
nāṁḍu śrīmadrājamahēṁdrapuravarādhīśvara śrī mārkkaṁḍḍē
śvara śrīmahādēvaraku bōtamāṟēni kuṁttuṟu pōtāsāni Akhaṁḍḍa
dīpamunaku na pōtanapāṁgu koḍku kētanabōyuni vasamuna
beṭṭina Inuvayeḍlu 50 . vīniṁjēkoni nityā(tya) sāniyamāneṁḍu
nēyi Ācaṁdrārkamu naḍupaṁgalavāṁḍu [.] śrī [.]
Digital edition of SII 42.246 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
